apps.name: Royal Launcher
apps.description: The all-in-one desktop launcher for every Royal app. Auto-updates, one-click installs, and a clean dashboard.
apps.releaseNotes: Added auto-update engine and a redesigned library view.

apps.name: Royal Cleaner
apps.description: Free up disk space and speed up your PC. Removes junk files, caches, and leftover installers safely.
apps.releaseNotes: Faster deep-scan and a new scheduled cleanup mode.

apps.name: Royal Notes
apps.description: A fast, distraction-free notes app with markdown support and local-first storage. Your notes stay on your device.
